notes: Recovery pass. Surfaced 3 closures from morning pass: PR #125 (#120 finalize() rejection trap), PR #126 (#121 tutorial-hand wiring broke game), PR #127 stacked collateral. Built #129 mobile debug overlay as PR #130 (unblocks mobile diagnosis - live prod shows blank canvas). Built #128 as PR #131 with Ripons diagnosed finalize() all-4-dirs fix PLUS NEW runtime generator smoke in scripts/validate-smoke-generator.js auto-wired via scripts/validate.js discovery - smoke asserts >=15 arrows + >=85% fill + >=25% curly on Moderate reference board, result: 34 arrows 93% fill 16 curly. Six anti-regression traps all absent. Tutorial-hand left CLOSED (121/122) - refiling would be saga-fuel; will reassess after #129 reveals mobile root cause. Filed 2 factory-improvement issues to sahilmodi1965/stratos-games-factory: #33 (generator smoke requirement - now implemented in #131) and #34 (decomposition rule wiring gap). Saved 4 memory files including feedback_autonomous_default capturing Sahils preference for autonomous execution in all future go sessions.

Sprint-3 PR-B shipped as PR #111: 4 issues — #33 reconnect grace window, #34 host migration, #50 in-game chat + profanity filter, #51 local game history (localStorage per CLAUDE.md no-backend rule). 6 commits. Node sim 159→206 (+47 cases). Subagent falsely reported 2 regressions as pre-existing; I verified on baseline b122777 and confirmed they were NEW regressions introduced by the grace-window wiring interpreting Supabase retrack phantom leave events as real disconnects. Root cause: presence:leave fires on every channel.track() call. Fix committed as 17b6a26 — filter leaves matching local player id. All previously-green tests restored. Only remaining failure is multi-client flake (different symptom: vote tie loop instead of host-gone), not a PR-B issue. 16 passed / 1 skipped / 1 failed.

Outcome-based roadmap v1 declared. North star: ship real-world working products with correct monetization/distribution/compliance. F-series factory milestones (F1 one game shipped, F2 multi on cycle, F3 weekly cadence, F4 5/week portfolio) and G-series per-game (G1 foundation through G5 cadence on autopilot) defined in council/ROADMAP.md and council/MILESTONE. Milestone gate added to CLAUDE.md Step 2 — future-milestone issues invisible until current closes. Self-improvement debt clause: milestone complete only when outcome holds AND lessons encoded in brain. Council may re-shape milestones (never north star) if regression demands. All 3 games under F1 in parallel; Bloxplode under retroactive-harmonization constraint (no major refactor). 25 factory-improvement issues retagged into F-buckets; council #1 (cron auth) and #3 (runs.jsonl) closed as completed. F4 work (federated MCP, multi-harness, genre packs) now forbidden until F1 closes.
